title: pisum nissolia
intro: Pisum nissolia, also known as Field Pea, is a legume plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pisum nissolia include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
